name: Mixed Fruit and Yam Gratin
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup dry white wine or apple juice
recipeInstructions: A hearty fall side dish, especially nice with pork, this recipe can also be served at brunch, topped with nonfat plain or vanilla yogurt. If you like, you can also bake these flavorful yams in an oval gratin dish. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C). Spray a rectangular dish, 10 X 6 X 1-1/2 inches, with nonstick cooking spray. Peel and cut the yams into 1/4-inch slices. Layer half of the yams in the dish. Mix together the pineapple, banana, apple, and raisins. Spread half of the fruit mixture over the yams. Repeat with the remaining yams and fruit mixture. Combine the remaining ingredients (brown sugar, lemon peel, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg) and pour evenly over the yams and fruit mixture. Cover and bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until the yams are tender. Serve six portions.
